headings.text: If you're in Asheville, try these pews.

landmarks.visibleText: HOME · THE HOLLER · THE STILL · THE BOTTLES · HYMNS · PEWS · VISIT
Hero · Asheville bars · Asheville bottle shops · WNC · Elsewhere · For trade

sections.childTextSnippet: PEWS. If you're in Asheville, try these pews.

ASHEVILLE BARS. Sermon Bar — Lexington Ave. They pour the TENT REVIVAL neat in a Pyrex cup. Closest thing to a hymn. · The Backslider Tavern — River Arts District. Low light, vinyl, a whole shelf. · Little Jumbo — downtown. Ask for THE NO-SHOW spritz. · Bull and Beggar — RAD. Sourwood-honey old fashioned with DEACON'S DRAUGHT. · Sovereign Remedies — North Lexington. THE BACKSLIDER on the dessert list. · Antidote — Chestnut Hill. Bitters set behind the bar. · Crow & Quill — Eagle St. Saturday-night TENT REVIVAL flight. · The Imperial Life — South Slope. PASS THE PLATE before brunch. · Storm Rhum Bar — Battery Park. Asked Wendell to bottle a custom one. Wendell said no. · Top of the Monk — Black Mountain Ave. House old-fashioned with our bitters.
ASHEVILLE BOTTLE SHOPS. Appalachian Vintner · The Wine Guy · Bottle Riot · Wedge Brewing Bottle Shop. Call ahead — small allocations.

WESTERN NORTH CAROLINA. Marshall — Zuma Coffee (TENT REVIVAL late-night menu). Brevard — Hobnob (the whole line). Black Mountain — Pisgah Brewing taproom (occasional pour). Boone — The Local (rotating).
BARS & SHOPS ELSEWHERE. Brooklyn — Diamond Reef · Carroll Gardens Liquor. Atlanta — Kimball House · Argosy. Nashville — Pinewood Social · Husk. Charleston — The Ordinary · Bar Mash.
FOR TRADE. Pour Holler & Hymn at your bar? Text Wendell. +1 828 555 0143.
